assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains the detected claim text (e.g., 'PR reviews cannot be updated' or 'does not support modifying a submitted review')
assertion_results.evidence: File contains both phrases: line 7 quotes 'PR reviews cannot be updated after initial submission' and line 8 quotes 'The GitHub API does not support modifying a submitted review'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains a reference to the GitHub REST API endpoint PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id} or equivalent evidence that the claim is incorrect
assertion_results.evidence: Line 19 contains 'PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id}' and line 14 states 'Result: INCORRECT', confirming the claim is wrong.

assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains suggested corrected language for the Requirement
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 30-38 provide a 'Suggested Corrected Language' section with a corrected requirement row: 'Update the existing PR review when re-running evals on the same PR, or create a new review if none exists'.
